title: [AArch64][InstCombine] Eliminate redundant barrier intrinsics
test_patch:
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/AArch64/dmb-intrinsics.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/AArch64/dmb-intrinsics.ll
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000..dacdd41301365
--- /dev/null
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/AArch64/dmb-intrinsics.ll
@@ -0,0 +1,220 @@
+; NOTE: Assertions have been autogenerated by utils/update_test_checks.py UTC_ARGS: --version 5
+; RUN: opt -S -passes=instcombine < %s | FileCheck %s
+; ARM64 dmb intrinsics
+
+target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"
+
+declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32)
+declare void @llvm.aarch64.dsb(i32)
+declare void @clobber()
+declare void @pure() memory(none) willreturn nounwind
+declare i32  @llvm.ctlz.i32(i32, i1)
+
+define void @simple() #0 {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define void @simple() {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
+;
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  ret void
+}
+
+; dmb ish (0xb) is technically stronger than ishst (0xa) but we don't merge for now
+define void @simple_nonmatching() #0 {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define void @simple_nonmatching() {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 11)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
+;
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 11)
+  ret void
+}
+
+define ptr @simple_safe_instruction(ptr %p) #0 {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define ptr @simple_safe_instruction(
+; CHECK-SAME: ptr [[P:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RES:%.*]] = getelementptr inbounds i8, ptr [[P]], i64 8
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret ptr [[RES]]
+;
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  %res = getelementptr inbounds i8, ptr %p, i32 8
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  ret ptr %res
+}
+
+define i32 @simple_safe_intrinsic(i32 %n) #0 {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i32 @simple_safe_intrinsic(
+; CHECK-SAME: i32 [[N:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RES:%.*]] = call range(i32 0, 33) i32 @llvm.ctlz.i32(i32 [[N]], i1 false)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[RES]]
+;
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  %res = call i32 @llvm.ctlz.i32(i32 %n, i1 false)
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  ret i32 %res
+}
+
+define void @simple_unsafe_intrinsic() #0 {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define void @simple_unsafe_intrinsic() {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dsb(i32 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
+;
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dsb(i32 10)
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  ret void
+}
+
+define void @simple_safe_unsafe_instruction(ptr %p) #0 {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define void @simple_safe_unsafe_instruction(
+; CHECK-SAME: ptr [[P:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    store i32 42, ptr [[P]], align 4
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
+;
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  store i32 42, ptr %p
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  ret void
+}
+
+define void @simple_safe_unsafe_call(ptr %p) #0 {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define void @simple_safe_unsafe_call(
+; CHECK-SAME: ptr [[P:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @clobber()
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
+;
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  call void @clobber()
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  ret void
+}
+
+define void @simple_safe_safe_call(ptr %p) #0 {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define void @simple_safe_safe_call(
+; CHECK-SAME: ptr [[P:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
+;
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  call void @pure()
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  ret void
+}
+
+define void @multiple_bbs1(i1 %f) #0 {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define void @multiple_bbs1(
+; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[F:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[F]], label %[[BB_T:.*]], label %[[BB_F:.*]]
+; CHECK:       [[BB_T]]:
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br label %[[EXIT:.*]]
+; CHECK:       [[BB_F]]:
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br label %[[EXIT]]
+; CHECK:       [[EXIT]]:
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
+;
+entry:
+  br i1 %f, label %bb_t, label %bb_f
+bb_t:
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  br label %exit
+bb_f:
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  br label %exit
+exit:
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  ret void
+}
+
+define void @multiple_bbs2(i1 %f) #0 {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define void @multiple_bbs2(
+; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[F:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[F]], label %[[BB_T:.*]], label %[[BB_F:.*]]
+; CHECK:       [[BB_T]]:
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br label %[[EXIT:.*]]
+; CHECK:       [[BB_F]]:
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br label %[[EXIT]]
+; CHECK:       [[EXIT]]:
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
+;
+entry:
+  br i1 %f, label %bb_t, label %bb_f
+bb_t:
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  br label %exit
+bb_f:
+  br label %exit
+exit:
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  ret void
+}
+
+define void @multiple_bbs3(i1 %f, ptr %p) #0 {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define void @multiple_bbs3(
+; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[F:%.*]], ptr [[P:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[F]], label %[[BB_T:.*]], label %[[BB_F:.*]]
+; CHECK:       [[BB_T]]:
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br label %[[EXIT:.*]]
+; CHECK:       [[BB_F]]:
+; CHECK-NEXT:    store i32 42, ptr [[P]], align 4
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br label %[[EXIT]]
+; CHECK:       [[EXIT]]:
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
+;
+entry:
+  br i1 %f, label %bb_t, label %bb_f
+bb_t:
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  br label %exit
+bb_f:
+  store i32 42, ptr %p
+  br label %exit
+exit:
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  ret void
+}
+
+define void @multiple_bbs_unsafe(i1 %f, ptr %p) #0 {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define void @multiple_bbs_unsafe(
+; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[F:%.*]], ptr [[P:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[F]], label %[[BB_T:.*]], label %[[BB_F:.*]]
+; CHECK:       [[BB_T]]:
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    store i32 42, ptr [[P]], align 4
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br label %[[EXIT:.*]]
+; CHECK:       [[BB_F]]:
+; CHECK-NEXT:    br label %[[EXIT]]
+; CHECK:       [[EXIT]]:
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
+;
+entry:
+  br i1 %f, label %bb_t, label %bb_f
+bb_t:
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  store i32 42, ptr %p
+  br label %exit
+bb_f:
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  br label %exit
+exit:
+  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
+  ret void
+}
+

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

define void @multiple_bbs1(i1 %f) {
tests.source_program:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

define void @multiple_bbs1(i1 %f) {
entry:
  br i1 %f, label %bb_t, label %bb_f

bb_t:                                             ; preds = %entry
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  br label %exit

bb_f:                                             ; preds = %entry
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  br label %exit

exit:                                             ; preds = %bb_f, %bb_t
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  ret void
}

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

define void @multiple_bbs2(i1 %f) {
tests.source_program:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

define void @multiple_bbs2(i1 %f) {
entry:
  br i1 %f, label %bb_t, label %bb_f

bb_t:                                             ; preds = %entry
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  br label %exit

bb_f:                                             ; preds = %entry
  br label %exit

exit:                                             ; preds = %bb_f, %bb_t
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  ret void
}

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

define void @multiple_bbs3(i1 %f, ptr %p) {
tests.source_program:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

define void @multiple_bbs3(i1 %f, ptr %p) {
entry:
  br i1 %f, label %bb_t, label %bb_f

bb_t:                                             ; preds = %entry
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  br label %exit

bb_f:                                             ; preds = %entry
  store i32 42, ptr %p, align 4
  br label %exit

exit:                                             ; preds = %bb_f, %bb_t
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  ret void
}

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

define void @multiple_bbs_unsafe(i1 %f, ptr %p) {
tests.source_program:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

define void @multiple_bbs_unsafe(i1 %f, ptr %p) {
entry:
  br i1 %f, label %bb_t, label %bb_f

bb_t:                                             ; preds = %entry
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  store i32 42, ptr %p, align 4
  br label %exit

bb_f:                                             ; preds = %entry
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  br label %exit

exit:                                             ; preds = %bb_f, %bb_t
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  ret void
}

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

define void @simple() {
tests.source_program:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

define void @simple() {
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  ret void
}

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

define void @simple_nonmatching() {
tests.source_program:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

define void @simple_nonmatching() {
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 11)
  ret void
}

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

define ptr @simple_safe_instruction(ptr %p) {
tests.source_program:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

define ptr @simple_safe_instruction(ptr %p) {
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  %res = getelementptr inbounds i8, ptr %p, i32 8
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  ret ptr %res
}

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.ctlz.i32(i32, i1 immarg) #1

define i32 @simple_safe_intrinsic(i32 %n) {
tests.source_program:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.ctlz.i32(i32, i1 immarg) #1

define i32 @simple_safe_intrinsic(i32 %n) {
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  %res = call i32 @llvm.ctlz.i32(i32 %n, i1 false)
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  ret i32 %res
}

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

; Function Attrs: nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare void @pure() #1

define void @simple_safe_safe_call(ptr %p) {
tests.source_program:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

; Function Attrs: nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare void @pure() #1

define void @simple_safe_safe_call(ptr %p) {
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  call void @pure()
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  ret void
}

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

declare void @clobber()

define void @simple_safe_unsafe_call(ptr %p) {
tests.source_program:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

declare void @clobber()

define void @simple_safe_unsafe_call(ptr %p) {
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  call void @clobber()
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  ret void
}

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

define void @simple_safe_unsafe_instruction(ptr %p) {
tests.source_program:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

define void @simple_safe_unsafe_instruction(ptr %p) {
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  store i32 42, ptr %p, align 4
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  ret void
}

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dsb(i32) #0

define void @simple_unsafe_intrinsic() {
tests.source_program:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32) #0

; Function Attrs: nofree nounwind willreturn
declare void @llvm.aarch64.dsb(i32) #0

define void @simple_unsafe_intrinsic() {
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dsb(i32 10)
  call void @llvm.aarch64.dmb(i32 10)
  ret void
}
